notes: Tighter music sync + spectrum floor + match-end fade. Floor waves act as a spectrum analyzer — top rows ride bass+kick, mid rows ride RMS+snare, bottom rows ride hat+snare; amplitude grows with loudness, scrolls faster on faster tracks, lights brighter when each band is active. Pulse decays tightened so beats don't smear at high BPM. Audio offset shifted to -55ms so visuals lead the audio pipeline lag — events now land on the same frame as the kick. Music fades out 1.2s when match ends instead of getting chopped mid-bar.
